name: ai-agent-engine-codex
description: Codex-native AE engineering workflow skills for requirements, planning, governance, tasks, implementation, review, validation, and handoff.

author.name: AI Agent Engine for Codex maintainers

interface.shortDescription: AE engineering workflow entrypoints for Codex
interface.longDescription: AI Agent Engine for Codex adapts AE-style engineering workflows into project-local Codex skills and helper scripts. It references AI Agent Engine, OpenAI plugins, Superpowers, everything-claude-code, and GitHub Spec Kit as workflow inputs, while keeping a Codex-native runtime boundary. Capabilities include project init, ideation, requirement clarification, PRD, governance constitution, full workflow orchestration, planning, task breakdown, work execution, review, frontend and backend work, debugging, TDD, browser validation, SQL, Swagger/OpenAPI summaries, handoff, prompt optimization, experience capture, skill and agent creation, language switching, and plugin updates.
interface.developerName: AI Agent Engine for Codex maintainers
defaultPrompt: 使用 AE 全流程把这个需求推进到验证交付。
使用 AE 初始化为当前项目创建项目文档和 AI 记忆库。
使用 AE 审查检查我当前的变更。
使用 AE 计划为这个功能生成实现计划。
使用 AE Web 应用开发完成这个前端或轻量全栈功能。
使用 AE 后端实现这个接口或服务改动。
使用 AE 调试排查这个错误。
